name: reminders-app-shots
description: Screenshot/visual-diff harness for reminders-app (see the plan doc's Wave-1 'Verification backbone'). Fully standalone from test/e2e/ (own package.json/lockfile) and NOT wired into CI — run manually via run.sh. playwright-core is pinned to the exact version test/e2e/package-lock.json currently resolves to, because run.sh derives the mcr.microsoft.com/playwright image TAG from that same lockfile at runtime; if that version is bumped, regenerate this package's lockfile too (see README.md) so the two stay in lockstep.
